sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Don't let your anger burn against me, Lord
My bones are weary, my spirit worn
How long must I wrestle with this pain?
Turn your face to me once more

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Have mercy, have mercy
My soul is in deep distress
Return to me, deliver me
Through your unfailing tenderness

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: In death there are no memories of you
No praise rises from the silent grave
My bed is soaked with midnight tears
Each night, your presence I crave

sections.label: Bridge
lines: My eyes grow dim with sorrow
Weakness floods my frame
But through the darkest valley
I still call upon your name
Yet in this moment, hope breaks through
For you have heard my weeping prayer
My enemies will turn and flee
When they see that you are there

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Have mercy, have mercy
My soul is in deep distress
Return to me, deliver me
Through your unfailing tenderness

sections.label: Outro
lines: The Lord has heard my cry
The Lord receives my prayer
The Lord has heard my cry
And I know that He is there
